description.value:
A vial of thick, murky, unrefined Laublub oil in its rawest form. Too impure for a Delta Kilo Autarch to safely consume.

Douse

Pour charges onto the ground to coat the area with oil (radius scales with charges spent: 1 charge = 2.5 ft radius, 2 = 3.75 ft, 3 = 5 ft). Any creature entering or starting its turn there must succeed on a DC 10 + the douser's Dexterity modifier Dexterity saving throw or fall prone (and take 1d4 fire damage if the oil has been ignited; standing up requires the same save). The oil evaporates after 1 round. Igniting is GM adjudicated and grants a one-time +1 bonus to the triggering fire damage.

Throw

Ranged attack roll against a creature or object. On a hit, the target is coated in oil for 4 rounds. At the start of its turn, the target may spend its action and succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw to reduce the remaining duration by 5 rounds. Igniting (GM adjudicated) grants a one-time +1 bonus to the triggering fire damage.

description.chatFlavor: Failure: fall prone. Fire damage applies to anyone in the area once ignited (GM adjudicated), regardless of save result. Standing up requires the same save. Oil evaporates after 1 round.

On a hit, the target is coated in oil for 4 rounds (Roh). Wipe off with DC 10 Dexterity save as an action (reduces remaining duration by 5 rounds). Igniting (GM adjudicated) grants a one-time +1 bonus to triggering fire damage.
